source_metadata.title: 2024/12/05 - FD [Part 4]
source_metadata.description:
Thursday 5 December 2024 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

Item of business: 

2023/24 Annual review of the Border Executive Board

Hearing of evidence: 

Border Executive Board

Christine Stevenson, Comptroller and Chief Executive
Carolyn Tremain, Secretary for MBIE
Ray Smith, Director-General of Primary Industries
Audrey Sonerson, Secretary for Transport
Di Sarfati, Director General of Health
Vangelis Vitalis, Deputy Secretary, Trade and Economic (MFAT)
